positive: A stylized, central composition illustration featuring a majestic neon-lit forest fox sitting within a circular mandala frame. The fox is rendered in a clean, geometric, kawaii-but-sophisticated silhouette style, surrounded by stylized bioluminescent flora, abstract geometric patterns, and minimalist celestial bodies (moons, stars). The color palette is restricted to vibrant deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and deep midnight blues, giving a strong, high-contrast vaporwave/cyberpunk ethereal feel. Excellent contrast, perfect symmetry, suitable for a high-quality, repeatable apparel print. Vector art style, clean lines, solid color blocks, high detail illustration, centered, symmetrical composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noisy, low detail, gradient, photorealistic, 3d render, bokeh, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, jpeg artifacts
